meta.note: Day-0 baseline anchored to domain cutover. GSC data only exists from May 2 onward (new WP site). Data lag means May 10-11 may be incomplete. 9-day window is normal for first post-launch snapshot.

sitemap.note: Sitemap submitted May 8. 'indexed=0' in sitemap tool is normal lag for a 9-day-old domain — site IS receiving organic traffic and impressions, confirming active crawl. Expect indexation counts to populate over next 2-4 weeks.

tracked_keywords_57.note: 55/57 keywords show no GSC data at Day 9 — expected for a new domain. Google has not yet crawled/indexed service pages deeply enough to rank for these terms. Baseline positions are 'not ranking' for measurement purposes.

coverage_notes.actual_indexation_evidence: 194 unique queries generating impressions confirms active crawl and partial indexation despite sitemap tool showing 0. GSC sitemap indexed count lags actual by 2-4 weeks.
coverage_notes.recommended_action: Check indexation via URL Inspection on key service pages at 30-day mark (chino:audit May 13 will capture this).

core_web_vitals.note: CWV data not available via Search Analytics API for a 9-day-old domain. Insufficient CrUX data. Will be available in GSC CWV report once field data accumulates (~28 days of real-user traffic). Check at 30-day mark.
